What is the purpose of the military munitions rule (MMR)?
qas.a: to clarify when conventional and chemical military munitions become hazardous waste.

qas.q: MM that lands off-range are considered WMM if they
qas.a: are not promptly rendered safe or retrieved

qas.q: Which of the following is WMM?
qas.a: Munitions turned into Supply Point Amnesty Box

qas.q: Select all items that are considered as MM.
qas.a:
Chemical munitions and agents
Explosives, pyrotechnics, chemical or riot control agents.

qas.q: Which group takes the lead role to declare, conduct, or terminate Level 1 emergencies?
In which regulation, pamphlet or standard would you locate hazardous WMM characteristics?
qas.a: 40 CFR, Part 261, Subpart C or D

qas.q: Which federal entity governs the Resources Conservation Recovery Act (RCRA)?
When submitting a Designated Disposition Authority (DDA) Request, what item(s) must you provide if applicable to the appropriate DDA? Select all that apply.
qas.a:
Potential Use Statement.
Explanation of Circumstances
Statement.
Regulatory Status Statement.
Availability Statement

qas.q: How does the MMR support sustainable range management?
qas.a: By minimizing potential explosive hazards and harmful environmental impacts and by promoting R3

qas.q: Select all items not included in the military munitions' definition.
qas.a:
Nuclear weapons and components with warhead included .
Munitions not produced for DOD purposes
Wholly inert items
Improvised explosive devices (IEDs)

qas.q: During an emergency response, the EOD leader determined it was necessary to transport an item to a secure location and destroy it by detonation. Identify this emergency response type.
Which of the following characteristics distinguishes a difference between Level 1 and Level 2 emergencies?
qas.a: Level 2 emergencies do not require immediate response activities

qas.q: Why is range boundary documentation required?
During an explosives or munitions emergency response, who must transport munitions from an operational range to another location for the purpose of destruction?

An Explosives Ordinance Disposal (EOD) office receives a call from the local police indicating they require a Level 2 emergency response. The police request the EOD obtain an emergency permit. What is the first step the EOD should take?
qas.a: Determine if a Level 1 or a Level 2 response is required

qas.q: Per MMR and RCRA requirements, certain conditions must exist for an item to be considered a military munition (MM). Select three required conditions that constitute a MM.
qas.a:
Item must been produced by or used by or for the U.S. Armed Services .
Item must have been produced or used for national defense and security .

qas.q: Based on the MMR, when can normal transportation requirements for hazardous waste (HW) be exempted?
qas.a: When activities use Conditional Exemption (CE) for transportation

qas.q: When does MM become WMM?

qas.a: An Urgent Notice of Ammunition Reclassification (NAR)

qas.a: Only when the material qualifies as hazardous waste and an exemption does apply.

qas.a: When activities use Conditional Exemption (CE) for transportation

Unused munitions that are unserviceable
